channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned wardrobe, 7th March
item.description:
A large wardrobe left on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Aylesbury Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on street, 7th March
item.description:
Around 10pm last night

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Prince George Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping - repeat offenders, 7th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped at 10pm yesterday

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Prince George Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside of no 35 Princess Road, 7th March
item.description:
The manhole cover has been recently broken

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Princess Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime Bike, 7th March
item.description:
Lime bike abandoned in middle of bus stop new cross station stop W

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 394, New Cross Road, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 pot holes on crossing, 7th March
item.description:
On the crossing there are 2 pot holes one each side of the road getting bigger and won't be too long before they become dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Church Hill Road, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 fridges and household waste flytipped, 7th March
item.description:
Reporting again flytipped waste on Clapton terrace. Report claimed to have been collected but hasn’t.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shrubs and bushes obstructing footpath, 7th March
item.description:
The over hanging shrubs are making limited space for walking past. It hasn’t been trimmed for over a year.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tent Peg Lane, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and broken furniture dumped outside 85 Burrage Road, 7th March
item.description:
Rubbish and furniture have been dumped outside 85 Burrage Road. a bag of rubbish has been ripped open and is strewn over the pavement. It has been there for weeks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bike dumped by tree between 69 and 71 South Hill Road, 7th March
item.description:
The bike's been damaged/vandalised. Can't see a serial number.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70, South Hill Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 7th March
item.description:
Several deep photeholes along Thanet Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Thanet Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches on pavement and street, 7th March
item.description:
Branches have been in the street for a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Templar Street, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crashed car blocking path, 7th March
item.description:
It looks like this car has crashed and been abandoned. Or the someone has crashed into it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxhawth Crescent, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several potholes, 7th March
item.description:
There are several potholes on this small stretch of St James Way, including one big enough for a foot.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St James Way, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 7th March
item.description:
Deep enough for a foot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, The Grove, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bins not emptied - AGAIN, 7th March
item.description:
Black bins were not emptied this week yet again. It seems that at once a month our regular collection is not being followed through.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gadwall Way, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 7th March
item.description:
There is a dead fox on the pathment
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 249, Halfway Street, Longlands, Greater London

item.title: Dead fox NW side of pond in sunray gardens by path, 7th March
item.description:
Dead fox NW side of pond in sunray gardens by path
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Casino Avenue, Dulwich Village, Greater London

item.title: Bins left on the pavement permanently, 7th March
item.description:
Bins left permanently on the pavement in this narrow stretch of pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 137, Brayards Road, Nunhead, Greater London
